summary: Story 3.0 Mapbox migration fully specced (4 Dart files + 4 native/config files; PlaceService.geocode replaces geocoding; GeoJsonSource+LineLayer route render; PointAnnotationManager replaces Marker set). Tracking SOS/organizer controls/background GPS mapped to Flutter layers and rideglory-api modules. API contracts defined: POST tracking/start+end, GET /events/:id/route, GET /places/geocode, WS tracking.sos/tracking.sos.alert/tracking.event.ended, 2 cron entries (maintenance 30d, event 24h). SOS handler boundary clarified (gateway transport + events-ms sosTriggeredAt dedup). VehicleModel SOAT fields + Home badge. ERD + SOS sequence diagram added to DIAGRAMS.md. 4 role-targeted slim handoffs written (backend, frontend, devops, qa).

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.detail: All 10 required artifacts written: architect.md, 4 slim handoffs, DIAGRAMS.md, state.json, checkpoint, contract, skill

qualityGates.name: architecture_contracts_defined
qualityGates.detail: 7 API contracts defined (2 HTTP, 1 GET route, 1 GET geocode, 3 WS message types, 2 cron entries). Story 3.0 specced to file level.

qualityGates.name: slim_handoffs_within_120_lines
qualityGates.detail: architect-for-backend.md: ~100 lines. architect-for-frontend.md: ~118 lines. architect-for-devops.md: ~90 lines. architect-for-qa.md: ~110 lines. All within limit.

qualityGates.name: no_scope_drift
qualityGates.detail: All decisions trace to PO handoff stories US-3-0 through US-3-8 and tasks T-3-1 through T-3-12. No new stories introduced.

qualityGates.name: brownfield_extend_not_rebuild
qualityGates.detail: TrackingGateway, TrackingWsClient, LiveTrackingCubit, NotificationSchedulerService all extended. SOS widget stubs (sos_button.dart, sos_confirm_dialog.dart, sos_active_overlay.dart) wired — not rebuilt. No new microservice.
